name: Pesto Salmon and Sea Scallops with Lemon/Garl
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the basic pesto on top of each salmon fillet.
2. Sprinkle herbed bread crumbs on top.
3. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
4. Place the salmon and scallops in an oiled baking dish.
5. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until cooked through. Turn over once.
6. Serve each of 4 individual servings plates with Lemon Roasted Garlic Beurre Blanc.
7. Place a salmon fillet and two sea scallops on top of the sauce.
